title: NIT Warangal is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: NIT Warangal is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!
